title: Incubation of Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803 colonies for plate reader measurement
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"33unj","text":"In this protocol, the incubation of Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803 colonies on agarplates and further incubation in flasks for further plate reader measurements for fluorescence detection are described. The protocol was handed over by Anna Behle MSc.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":36,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"cog2v","text":"Prepare BG-11 media-based agar plates.You can use the recipe for standard BG-11 media, which includes the recipe for BG-11 media based agar plates.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":54,"length":31}],"data":[]},{"key":"1aerg","text":"Order/borrow agar plates, fresh cultures or cryo cultures with your desired colonies. If your agar plates are contaminated, make sure that you only pick uncontaminated colonies.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":13,"length":44},{"style":"bold","offset":68,"length":16},{"style":"bold","offset":153,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"BEBA8C315BB242EC91691A7E31CFB0A6","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/recipe-for-standard-bg-11-media-gtmbwk6"}}}}
warning:
{"blocks":[{"key":"9cmm0","text":" Make sure to work under sterile conditions! It's also recommended to work in cold seasons or in a climated environment to avoid fungal contaminations.
  
 Wear gloves when preparing stocks!
 Heavy metals are toxic for the environment and need to be discarded accordingly.
 Make sure to check your reagents and chemicals for safety warnings and correct waste disposal!
 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":14,"length":29},{"style":"bold","offset":123,"length":27},{"style":"bold","offset":156,"length":34},{"style":"bold","offset":287,"length":81}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
